title: Reliable fault-record transfer and exact RCB export
titleId: Transfer fault record yang andal dan export RCB yang presisi
summary: ARSAS 1.6.18 strengthens field workflows for IEC 61850 fault-record download, physical IED identity, and selected-RCB CID export while keeping the user interface compact and evidence-driven.
summaryId: ARSAS 1.6.18 memperkuat workflow lapangan untuk download fault record IEC 61850, identitas fisik IED, dan export CID selected-RCB dengan UI yang tetap compact serta berbasis evidence.
highlights: Fault-record transfer now supports adaptive remote paths, large segmented COTP responses, automatic file scanning, overwrite-safe redownloads, and detailed failure diagnostics.
Physical IED identity is resolved independently from complete MMS Logical Device domain names, preventing incorrect IEDName export.
Selected-RCB CID export preserves the exact live MMS RCB name and prevents invalid duplicate instance suffixes such as A_BRCB_120101.
The RCB export and fault-record windows use cleaner compact layouts with clearer availability, downloaded-state, and selection feedback.
highlightsId: Transfer fault record kini mendukung adaptive remote path, respons COTP segmented berukuran besar, scan file otomatis, redownload dengan overwrite aman, dan diagnostic kegagalan yang rinci.
Identitas fisik IED diselesaikan terpisah dari nama domain MMS Logical Device yang lengkap sehingga export IEDName tidak lagi salah.
Export CID selected-RCB mempertahankan nama RCB MMS live secara presisi dan mencegah suffix instance ganda yang tidak valid seperti A_BRCB_120101.
Window RCB export dan fault record menggunakan layout compact yang lebih bersih dengan feedback availability, status downloaded, dan selection yang lebih jelas.
improvements: COMTRADE companion files and vendor package-style records can be discovered and downloaded through the same guarded file-service workflow.
File transfer diagnostics capture the failing MMS stage, invoke ID, FRSM, session state, and request/response evidence.
Downloaded fault records remain selectable for intentional overwrite instead of being permanently disabled.
Exact live RCB-name regressions are protected by engine tests and application release gates.
Installer, portable ZIP, and combined SHA-256 checksums are published together after build and silent install/uninstall smoke tests.
improvementsId: File pendamping COMTRADE dan record berbentuk vendor package dapat ditemukan serta diunduh melalui workflow file service yang sama dan tetap guarded.
Diagnostic transfer file merekam tahap MMS yang gagal, invoke ID, FRSM, status session, serta evidence request/response.
Fault record yang sudah terdownload tetap dapat dipilih untuk overwrite yang disengaja dan tidak dinonaktifkan permanen.
Regression nama RCB live yang presisi dilindungi oleh test engine dan release gate aplikasi.
Installer, portable ZIP, dan checksum SHA-256 gabungan dipublikasikan bersama setelah build serta silent install/uninstall smoke test.
knownLimitations: Windows x64 is the only packaged desktop platform in the current stable release.
The public binaries are not Authenticode code-signed; Windows SmartScreen may show an unrecognized-publisher warning.
Raw-Ethernet GOOSE and Sampled Values workflows require Npcap, an approved adapter and suitable capture permissions.
Relay file-service directories and COMTRADE companion sets vary by vendor; a successful transfer does not prove record completeness or scaling correctness.
Active control and report-configuration writes still require approved procedures, plant authority and independent verification.
ARSAS is an engineering evidence tool and does not provide IEC 61850 conformance certification or replace calibrated protection testing.
knownLimitationsId: Windows x64 adalah satu-satunya platform desktop yang dipaketkan pada stable release saat ini.
Binary publik belum ditandatangani dengan Authenticode; Windows SmartScreen dapat menampilkan peringatan unrecognized publisher.
Workflow raw-Ethernet GOOSE dan Sampled Values memerlukan Npcap, adapter yang disetujui dan permission capture yang sesuai.
Struktur directory file service relay dan pasangan file COMTRADE berbeda antar-vendor; transfer berhasil tidak membuktikan record lengkap atau scaling sudah benar.
Active control dan write pada konfigurasi reporting tetap memerlukan procedure yang disetujui, plant authority dan independent verification.
ARSAS adalah tool engineering evidence dan tidak memberikan sertifikasi conformity IEC 61850 atau menggantikan calibrated protection testing.

codeSigning.label: Not Authenticode-signed
codeSigning.detail: The current public Windows installer and portable binaries do not carry a commercial Authenticode publisher signature. Verify the published SHA-256 value before use. SmartScreen warnings are therefore possible and are not hidden from users.
codeSigning.detailId: Installer Windows dan binary portable publik saat ini belum memiliki commercial Authenticode publisher signature. Verifikasi nilai SHA-256 yang dipublikasikan sebelum digunakan. Karena itu peringatan SmartScreen masih mungkin muncul dan status ini tidak disembunyikan dari user.

screenshot.altId: Workspace live value ARSAS 1.6.18 stable dengan evidence IED, value, quality dan timestamp

screenshot.captionId: Representasi workspace stable ARSAS 1.6.18. Identitas device, value, quality, timestamp dan konteks acquisition tetap terlihat bersama.
